platform_decisions.content: Graceful shutdown with tiered priority: terminal cleanup (sync) then resume hint then async cleanup then SessionEnd hooks then analytics flush (500ms cap)
Analytics dual-sink with per-sink killswitch; early events use cached GrowthBook from previous session
Telemetry span lifecycle uses WeakRef + 30min TTL cleanup interval; strong refs for LLM requests only
Lazy schema construction via lazySchema() factory defers Zod compilation to first access
Startup profiling dual-mode: sampled analytics (100% ant, 0.5% external) + detailed env-gated profiling
Cleanup registry with unregister functions: global Set-based, decoupled from shutdown module
Buffered JSONL writer: 1000ms flush, 50-entry buffer, per-path writer instances with lazy dir creation
Secret scanning with 24+ curated gitleaks regex rules; API key prefix assembled at runtime to avoid literal in bundle
Connection error details extracted from up to 5 levels of cause chain with SSL code matching and HTML sanitization
Migration framework: source-scoped idempotent updates without completion markers (11 migration files)
Self-registering swarm backend pattern: backends register with central registry on import to avoid circular deps
